site.name: Bactopia
site.tagline: An extensive workflow to process Nanopore and Illumina sequencing for bacterial genomes.

sections.title: Bactopia
sections.description: Core Bactopia documentation -- installation, quick start, tutorials, and workflow reference.

pages.title: Bactopia
pages.description: An extensive workflow to process Nanopore and Illumina sequencing for bacterial genomes.

pages.title: Quick Start
pages.description: Get started using Bactopia in a few commands, no asking questions and no looking back!

pages.title: Installation
pages.description: Learn how Bactopia install and get started using Bactopia for your genomic analyses.

pages.title: Beginner's Guide
pages.description: A beginner's guide to getting started using Bactopia to process your bacterial genomes.

pages.title: Tutorial
pages.description: A tutorial to get started with Bactopia using publicly available genomes.

pages.title: Bactopia Workflow
pages.description: Comprehensive bacterial analysis pipeline for complete genomic characterization.

pages.title: Changelog
pages.description: A full list of Bactopia releases and a description of the changes.

sections.title: Bactopia Tools
sections.description: Additional analysis workflows that run specific tools on existing Bactopia results.
